testcase.name: test_health_checkup_reminder_no_places

failure.message: AssertionError: BIBLE VIOLATION: nearby_places triggered for reminder query! Got 4 places assert 4 == 0 + where 4 = len({'city': 'Mumbai', 'is_emergency': False, 'places': [{'address': 'Link Road, Andheri West, Mumbai', 'area': 'Andheri West', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹500-800', ...}, {'address': 'Hill Road, Bandra West, Mumbai', 'area': 'Bandra West', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹500-800', ...}, {'address': 'Worli Sea Face, Mumbai 400018', 'area': 'Worli', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹600-1000', ...}], 'type': 'vet_clinics'})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_223_bible_compliance_places.py:89: in test_health_checkup_reminder_no_places assert len(nearby_places) == 0, f"BIBLE VIOLATION: nearby_places triggered for reminder query! Got {len(nearby_places)} places" E AssertionError: BIBLE VIOLATION: nearby_places triggered for reminder query! Got 4 places E assert 4 == 0 E + where 4 = len({'city': 'Mumbai', 'is_emergency': False, 'places': [{'address': 'Link Road, Andheri West, Mumbai', 'area': 'Andheri West', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹500-800', ...}, {'address': 'Hill Road, Bandra West, Mumbai', 'area': 'Bandra West', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹500-800', ...}, {'address': 'Worli Sea Face, Mumbai 400018', 'area': 'Worli', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹600-1000', ...}], 'type': 'vet_clinics'})

testcase.name: test_schedule_vaccination_no_places

failure.message: AssertionError: BIBLE VIOLATION: nearby_places triggered for schedule query! assert 4 == 0 + where 4 = len({'city': 'Mumbai', 'is_emergency': False, 'places': [{'address': 'Link Road, Andheri West, Mumbai', 'area': 'Andheri West', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹500-800', ...}, {'address': 'Hill Road, Bandra West, Mumbai', 'area': 'Bandra West', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹500-800', ...}, {'address': 'Worli Sea Face, Mumbai 400018', 'area': 'Worli', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹600-1000', ...}], 'type': 'vet_clinics'})

E assert 4 == 0 E + where 4 = len({'city': 'Mumbai', 'is_emergency': False, 'places': [{'address': 'Link Road, Andheri West, Mumbai', 'area': 'Andheri West', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹500-800', ...}, {'address': 'Hill Road, Bandra West, Mumbai', 'area': 'Bandra West', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹500-800', ...}, {'address': 'Worli Sea Face, Mumbai 400018', 'area': 'Worli', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'consultation_fee': '₹600-1000', ...}], 'type': 'vet_clinics'})

failure.message: TypeError: object of type 'NoneType' has no len()
